news.t: J.P. Morgan Asset Management Completes Conversion of Four Mutual Funds to ETFs

holdings.infoBox: JPEF is an equity ETF with a total of 41 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 9.14%, Alphabet at 6.94%, Apple at 4.68%, Amazon.com at 4.44%, and Broadcom at 3.56%.

overview.description: The JPMorgan Equity Focus ETF (JPEF) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively managed ETF that provides exposure to a narrow basket of US stocks. Selection integrates ESG factors to their bottom-up fundamental analysis. JPEF was launched on Jul 28, 2023 and is issued by JPMorgan Chase.

data.title: J.P. Morgan Asset Management Completes Conversion of Four Mutual Funds to ETFs
data.text: NEW YORK , July 31, 2023 /PRNewswire/ -- J.P. Morgan Asset Management today announced the firm has successfully completed the conversion of four mutual funds to ETFs.
